analysis.reason: The email subject contains the word 'URGENT' and mentions a strict deadline (EOD). The body emphasizes time sensitivity and potential consequences of not meeting the deadline.
analysis.suggested_reply:
Dear [CEO's Name],

Thank you for your email. I understand the urgency of this matter and will ensure that the contract is signed today.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

analysis.reason: The email subject and body indicate an immediate need for action due to a critical system failure affecting clients.
analysis.suggested_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We are aware of the issue and our team is currently working on restoring the production server as quickly as possible. We will keep you updated on our progress.

analysis.reason: The email mentions a legal deadline that is approaching very soon (tomorrow), and it requests action by noon today.

urgency_signals: send all required documents by noon

analysis.suggested_reply:
Dear Legal Team,

Thank you for the reminder. I will ensure that all required documents are submitted by noon today.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
